title: Finding event (training-data-plan.md §3, §4, §5)
description: A confirmed finding filed via report(action='finding') — a graph node the exporter treats as a supervision target. References the proof artifact + optional evidence primitives; when a decision was recorded it is caused_by that decision (shared correlation_id), materializing decision → action → result → finding.

proof_artifact_id.description: agent-smith artifact id backing the finding (not a content hash)
